calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:16 a.m. and concluding at 9:20 a.m.

Plaintiff Design Blitz appearing represented by John Merchant, Esq. via zoom
Witness for Plaintiff Seth Hanley appeared via zoom.
Defendant Jogan Health, LLC, A C not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.
Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.
Court examines Plaintiff witness Seth Hanley and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Design Blitz, and against Defendant Jogan Health, LLC, as follows:

Damages: $25,118.85
Prejudgment Interest: $2,229.12
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $670.50
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $28,018.47

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
